title: Claude can now build interactive charts and diagrams, directly in the chat.  Available today in beta on all plans, including free.  Try it out: https://t.co/tHPAZRgQkn https://t.co/WXRrD4VkAt
why_it_matters: Claude's new interactive visualization feature ships to all plans including free — a major capability expansion that makes Claude a viable data exploration tool, not just a chat assistant.
action: Try building a chart in Claude today

title: Your videos can go further now.  We're introducing new Video API capabilities, powered by Sora 2: • Custom characters and objects • 16:9 and 9:16 exports • Clips up to 20 seconds • Video continuation
why_it_matters: OpenAI's Video API gets major upgrades via Sora 2 — custom characters, aspect ratios, 20-second clips, and video continuation. This turns Sora from a demo into a real production tool for developers building video features.
action: Check the new Video API docs

title: My autoresearch labs got wiped out in the oauth outage. Have to think through failovers. Intelligence brownouts will be interesting - the planet losing IQ points when frontier AI stutters.
why_it_matters: Karpathy coins 'intelligence brownouts' after an OAuth outage killed his autonomous research agents. As more workflows depend on frontier AI, infrastructure resilience becomes a first-class concern — plan for AI downtime like you plan for power outages.
action: Audit your AI dependency failovers

title: 📣 Technical lessons from building computer access for agents  Making long-running workflows practical required tightening the execution loop, providing rich context via file systems, and enabling network access with security guardrails.
why_it_matters: OpenAI shares hard-won engineering lessons from building computer-use agents — execution loops, filesystem context, and network security. Practical architecture patterns for anyone building long-running agent workflows.
action: Read the technical breakdown

title: PREDICTION - Amazon will ban all Gen-AI assisted code changes in the coming weeks!  More companies will follow.....
why_it_matters: A bold prediction that Amazon will ban AI-assisted code changes, citing concerns about tech debt and bug accumulation. Whether or not it happens, this reflects a real tension enterprises face between AI speed and code quality.
action: Evaluate your AI code review guardrails

title: Claude for all things knowledge work feels like it is on a very similar trajectory to what agentic coding experienced last year.

title: nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16: text-generation

title: We're announcing Canopy Height Maps v2 (CHMv2), an open source model for high-resolution global forest canopy mapping, developed in partnership with @WorldResources.
